name: Clermont Arts And Recreation Center
description: Clermont Arts And Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Clermont, FL. There are 16 asphalt and wood courts. 12 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.
fees: Fee required — Fee is only for indoor courts

name: Clermont National Pickleball
description: Clermont National Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clermont, FL. There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Dabney Recreation Center
description: Dabney Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Okahumpka, FL. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like water.
fees: Private — Must have a Villages ID Card to play

name: Donnelly Park
description: 3 new courts are under construction

name: Golden Triangle Regional Park - East Campus
description:
PICKLEBALL COURTS
COURTS OPEN 7 AM - 11 PM
RULES & REGULATIONS
OPEN COURT ONE-HOUR TIME LIMIT (WHEN OTHERS ARE WAITING)
PROPER FOOTWEAR REQUIRED
PLAY IS BASED ON FIRST COME, FIRST SERVED
ADULT SUPERVISION RECOMMENDED
The following are prohibited:

Pets, Bicycles, Rollerblades, Skateboards, Sitting or Pulling on Nets, Glass Containers, Food
Profanity, Verbal Threats, & Acts of Violence

name: Golden Triangle YMCA

name: Kehlor Park
description: Kehlor Park is a place to play pickleball in Clermont, FL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Open every day from 9am til 10pm except for the 1st and 3rd Friday of the month. they’re closed for teen night.
